array_of_oauth_credential_objects_each_w: Array of OAuth credential objects, each with credentialId, displayName, and providerId
array_of_oauth_provider_ids_to_filter_by: Array of OAuth provider IDs to filter by (e.g. ["google-email", "slack"]). Leave empty to return all OAuth credentials.
credential_id_pipe_into_other_blocks_cre: Credential ID — pipe into other blocks' credential fields
select_an_oauth_credential_once_and_pipe: Select an OAuth credential once and pipe its ID into any downstream block that requires authentication, or list all OAuth credentials in the workspace for iteration. No secrets are ever exposed — only credential IDs and metadata.
the_oauth_credential_id_to_resolve_selec: The OAuth credential ID to resolve (select operation)
